## Summary

What should Blue Jay do?

## Use Case

Who would use this, and in what authorised defensive workflow?

## Proposed Behaviour

Describe the command, output, report change, parser, or workflow you want.

## Safety Notes

Explain how this stays within Blue Jay's defensive and authorised-use boundaries.

## Alternatives Considered

List any simpler approaches or existing commands that partially solve this.
